summary: Sends DMX data to lighting hardware over Art-Net, sACN, KiNET, or FTDI USB. Reads channel/universe layout from one or more upstream DMX Fixture POPs.

key_params.name: destination
key_params.note: Target IP / multicast / device for the chosen protocol

common_gotchas: Active toggle defaults to off — nothing transmits until you enable it.
Multicast sACN needs the right NIC bound. On Windows, check Windows Defender Firewall — outgoing Art-Net/sACN must be allowed.
When using FTDI, only one TouchDesigner instance can hold the device at a time.
